description: Baseline assumption pack: grid intensity and per-token energy are sourced, order-of-magnitude estimates (see `provenance`); pricing is a list-price placeholder. Every figure `estimate` prints is (measured tokens from the ledger) x these assumptions — the ledger stores none of it. Copy this file, refine for your models/region/contract, and pass it with `estimate --pack`.
disclaimer: Baseline pack: grid + energy are order-of-magnitude estimates; pricing is a placeholder. Supply your own pack for figures you can stand behind.

grid.source: CodeCarbon world-average grid intensity fallback. For time/region-specific carbon, replace this scalar with an `intensity_by_date` list — [{"from": "YYYY-MM-DD", "gco2e_per_kwh": N}, ...] — and `estimate` fixes each commit's intensity from its own timestamp.

provenance.source: CodeCarbon global energy mix (world-average fallback, 475 gCO2e/kWh)
provenance.note: World average; replace with codecarbon's per-country/region values or a live source for accuracy.

~0.3-1.8 J per output token measured across frontier models; ~0.0003 Wh/output token (~1.1 J) taken as a central, order-of-magnitude estimate. Strongly model-, hardware-, and date-dependent (falling over time). NOT from codecarbon, which measures local CPU/GPU, not remote API inference.
1.2 as an industry-typical assumption; set your operator's PUE if known.
Illustrative per-Mtok rates; replace with your contracted rates. Unlisted models default to $0 (unknown).
